captureMethod.responses: spawn runRpcMode with a deterministic faux AgentSessionRuntime and capture child stdout bytes
captureMethod.framing: feed LF, CRLF, invalid, and final unterminated stdin into runRpcMode and capture child stdout bytes
captureMethod.events: emit deterministic faux AgentSession events through session.subscribe inside runRpcMode and capture child stdout bytes
captureMethod.extensionUi: invoke the runRpcMode ExtensionUIContext from bindExtensions with deterministic crypto.randomUUID preload

files.description: All current TS RPC command input shapes plus extension_ui_response variants.
Strict JSONL reader observations plus runRpcMode stdout bytes for LF, CRLF, parse-error, and final unterminated input.
Node JSON.parse-derived runRpcMode stdout bytes for whitespace, unterminated, invalid-token, trailing-comma object, and malformed array inputs.
runRpcMode stdout bytes for success, success-with-data, null data, command errors, parse error, and unknown-command quirk responses.
runRpcMode stdout bytes for base deterministic faux prompt event stream envelopes emitted via AgentSession.subscribe.
runRpcMode stdout bytes for thinking, tool call, tool execution, usage, details, and stop reason event shapes emitted via AgentSession.subscribe.
runRpcMode stdout bytes for session-level queue, compaction, retry, and session info events emitted via AgentSession.subscribe.
runRpcMode stdout bytes for ExtensionUIContext request methods plus extension_ui_response command input shapes.
